pi_items.source: Task instruction explicitly requests creating this directory. Talon standard user directory is AppData\Roaming\talon\user.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating four specific files for a Talon voice command bookmark system in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\bookmarks\. However, there is a fatal flaw: the required powershell hook export_result.ps1 is missing from the task folder. As a result, C:\temp\task_result.json is never created in the environment, and the verifier will perpetually fail immediately.
